  • Uses of SeasonalPeriodType in grafioschtrader.types

    Subclasses with type arguments of type SeasonalPeriodType in grafioschtrader.types
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    enum 
    SeasonalPeriodType
    Granularity of a seasonality heat map: the matrix columns are either the twelve calendar months or the four quarters of a year.
